---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
Here the workflor to analyse the answers of the survey obtained during the workshops in Caye Caulkera and Placencia in October 2024.

Import data for summary and inspection

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
Fishery_survey_Belize_2024 <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub_projects/Networks_SSF_NatCap/data/raw/Fishery_survey_Belize_2024.csv")
```
